entries.speaker: torren
lines: I can feel her — she's still in there. Hold them off

entries.speaker: narrator
lines: Dark streaks peel from the Fenmother's flanks. Beneath
the poison, hints of blue-white luminescence appear.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: She's fighting it. She's trying to help.

entries.speaker: narrator
lines: The corruption recedes nearly completely. Grey
coloration fades from the Fenmother's translucent body.

entries.speaker: narrator
lines: Light floods the hollow. The corruption lifts. The
Fenmother opens her eyes — clear, golden, grateful.
